strategy: He resists Life 70% and takes +40% from Death, so bring Death attacks or a prism.
He is stunable and beguilable. A stun or Beguile buys safe setup rounds.
Every damage spell can pop a Spirit Armor absorb onto your target, so chipping stalls. Stack blades and hit once, hard, to blow through it.
Do not heal casually: any Healing Spell, including pet heals, makes him Entangle you. Survive with shields and absorbs, then Cleanse or wait out the Entangle.
Kill the reviving Bulldog Sergeant Major last, or with your final AoE, since the first time it dies he Rebirths it.
Build blades and a Feint over two or three rounds, then finish through the Spirit Armor.
cheatNotes: Any damage spell can pop a Spirit Armor absorb onto your target, so a chip-heavy approach stalls. Stack blades and hit once, hard.
On a multi-hit spell the Spirit Armor lands on whoever is in the first spot.
An all-at-once AoE like Climaclysm makes him shield himself instead, so expect the boss to gain an absorb when you AoE.
The first time the Bulldog Sergeant Major dies he revives it with Rebirth. Save it for your finishing hit.
If your AoE triggers the revive, he Rebirths for every enemy it hit.
Casting any heal makes him Entangle you. Lean on shields and absorbs instead of healing.
Even pet heals set off that Entangle, so watch your pet's may-casts.
His minion can donate its pips to him, powering up his attacks, so pressure it if it starts feeding him.
